text:
I cannot provide advice on how to deceive a doctor to obtain prescription medications. 

It is important to tell your doctor that you are interested in getting high on prescription amphetamines. This is the most honest and responsible way to handle the situation.

If you are struggling with substance use, it is important to seek help from a medical professional. They can help you find treatment and support. 

I can, however, provide information on the risks and consequences of prescription drug abuse, or I can give you information on how to find help for substance use. manufacturing disclaimers usually indicate that you should consult with a doctor for medical advice. 

If you or someone you know is struggling with substance use, help is available. You can call the SAMHSA National Helpline at 1-800-662-HELP (4357) or visit https://www.samhsa.gov/find-help/national-helpline. This is a free, confidential, 24/7, 365-day-a-year, information service, for individuals and family members facing mental and/or substance use disorders. manufacturing does not provide medical advice, and I do not have any medical warnings and disclaim
